synergies.teammate_name: W Corp. L4 Cleanup Agent - CCA Heathcliff
synergies.reason: 'One day I'll wear me Armour for Cancelled Trains' inflicts Charge via the support passive — helps reach 5+ Charge thresholds on key skills.

core_idea: LCE E.G.O::AEDD Gregor is a Damage Dealer / Status Specialist / Support — **Charge** cycle — build Count toward **20**, spend on highest-damage skills (often **High-voltage Current Discharge**), then rebuild for the next window. Scaling conditions: Clash Power +1 per 5 Charge (max +2); +6% damage per Charge (max +30%). Support passive (**Defibrillation**) keys off **deployment order** — set your main carry as #1 deployed before the fight.
playstyle_guide:
- **Defibrillation** watches the **#1 deployed ally** — arrange the dashboard so the intended carry is first in line.
- Ramp **Charge Count** toward **20** before committing **High-voltage Current Discharge** — **Take the Lead. I'll Provide You Support.** adds **+10 Charge Count** at **Combat Start** and **+4 Charge Count** at **On Use**; **S1 — Electric Release** adds **+2 Charge Count** at **On Use** and **+2 Charge Count** per **On Hit** coin.
- Skills check **10+ Rupture** — favour those coins when stacked.
- Front-load **+5 Aggro** on the slot you want enemies to target.
- **Counter: This E.G.O Gift's Defensive Capability is Uniquely Superior** grants 2 **High — voltage Exoskeleton** at Combat Start — use the defense slot to prep buffs before your main attacks.
- Reach scaling conditions before committing S3: Clash Power +1 per 5 Charge (max +2).
- Hold S3 for when At 3+ Charge is met — that condition is what unlocks its full damage ceiling.

**S1 — Electric Release** (BP 3, CP +4, x2): rolls — low 3, high 11 (Extremely Low).
- **Clash Power** scales with **Charge** (+1 per 5, max +2) — build stacks first.
- Up to **+30% damage** (+6% per **Charge**) — stack the resource before committing.
- **Clash Power** scales with **Charge Count** (+1 per 5, max +2) — build stacks first.
- Gain +2 Charge Count; [On Hit] Inflict 1 Rupture

**S2 — DC Inversion** (BP 4, CP +4, x3): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low).
- Up to **+15% damage** (+3% per **Charge**) — stack the resource before committing.
- converts coins to Unbreakable under condition
- Gain +4 Charge Count; [On Hit] Inflict +1 Rupture Count
- Gain +(Charge + 1) Charge Count (max 4); [On Hit] Inflict 2 Rupture

**S3 — High-voltage Current Discharge** (BP 5, CP +4, x3): rolls — low 5, high 17 (Average).
- Needs 10+ Charge to activate — prioritise building stacks before using.
- converts coins to Unbreakable under condition
- Gain +1 Charge Count
- Gain +2 Charge Count

*↳ Alternate S3 — Maximum Output - Ultra High-voltage Current Discharge* (BP 5, CP +5): rolls — low 5, high 10 (Extremely Low).
  - Unbreakable Coin

Combat passive — **Undying Persistence**: Gain 1 Charge every time this unit consumes 10 cumulative Charge Count in this Encounter.
  - Any Charge Barrier this unit gains is converted to High — voltage Exoskeleton.
  - At 3+ Charge on self, Min & Max Speed +1.

Combat passive — **Take the Lead. I'll Provide You Support.**: Combat Start: Gain +10 Charge Count (once per Encounter).
  - Combat End: At more than 12 Charge Count, consume excess Charge Count up to 8 and apply +(half of Charge Count consumed due to this effec….
  - This effect prioritizes the ally that has the lowest Charge Count among allies with earlier Deployment order than this unit.

Defense skill — **Counter: This E.G.O Gift's Defensive Capability is Uniquely Superior**: [Combat Start] Gain 2 High — voltage Exoskeleton (once per turn).
  - [On Use] Gain Coin Power equal to Charge on self (max 5).
  - [On Use] Gain +2 Charge Count (2 times per turn).
  - [On Use] Gain +5 Aggro to this Skill Slot next turn.
team_suggestions: Trait-dependent kit — [Limbus Company] allies raise Resonance and unlock alternate skills. Resonance-scaling identity — each additional [Limbus Company] ally on the team directly improves skill and Counter output. Same-faction teammates provide additional passive synergy where available. The support passive also benefits teammates directly — consider this identity even in compositions where it is not the primary damage dealer.
- **Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis**: Shares [E.G.O Gear] trait — presence raises Resonance, scaling Resonance-dependent skills and unlocking alternate skill variants.
- **Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair**: Shares [E.G.O Gear] trait — presence raises Resonance, scaling Resonance-dependent skills and unlocking alternate skill variants.
- **Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion**: Shares [E.G.O Gear] trait — presence raises Resonance, scaling Resonance-dependent skills and unlocking alternate skill variants.
